base.name: Name
extension.description: A VSCode extension for visualizing URDF files and xacro files.
extension.configuration.title: URDF Visualizer
extension.configuration.packages.descrip: The path of ROS/ROS2 packages, it is used for parse `package://<package_name>` in URDF files. For example: `{"fake_robot": "src/fake_robot"}` means the root directory of package `fake_robot` is `src/fake_robot` in the workspace. You can configure multiple package paths, e.g. `{"fake_robot": "src/fake_robot", "another_robot": "robots/another_robot"}`.
extension.configuration.renderOnSave.des: Render the URDF/Xacro file when saving.
extension.configuration.reRenderWhenSwit: Re render the URDF/Xacro file when switching active file.
extension.configuration.cacheMesh.descri: Cache the mesh files to speed up loading.
The background color of the 3D viewer.
The color must be a valid hex color code, i.e. #FFFFFF.
extension.configuration.highlightJointWh: Highlight joint frame at top on hover.
extension.configuration.highlightLinkWhe: Highlight link frame at top on hover.
webview.control.title: Control
webview.control.showWorldFrame.hint: The red, green, and blue solid lines represent the x, y, and z axes respectively.
webview.control.showJointFrames.hint:
The red, green, and blue solid lines represent the x, y, and z axes respectively.
The black dashed line represents the axis of the joint.
Fixed joints will not be shown.
webview.control.showLinkFrames.hint: The red, green, and blue dashed lines represent the x, y, and z axes respectively.
webview.control.linkList.hint:
Display all links in the URDF model as a tree structure. 
Note: When a parent object is hidden, its child objects will also be hidden.
webview.control.showAllLinks.hint: Show all links in the URDF model.
webview.control.hideAllLinks.hint: Hide all links in the URDF model.
webview.control.jointList.hint:
The joint list only contains non-fixed joints, 
which can be dragged or clicked to control their position.
Double-clicking the slider will reset the joint position.
webview.control.resetJoints.hint: Reset all joint values to default
webview.settings.title: Settings
webview.settings.measurement.title: Measurement
webview.settings.measurement.precision.h: Set the minimum number of significant digits for measurement results.
webview.reload.hint: Reload the URDF/Xacro model from the active editor.
webview.clickDropFirstPoint: Click to drop the first point
webview.doubleClickCompleteMeasure: Double click or press Enter to complete the measurement
webview.escCancleMeasure: Press Esc to cancle the measurement
webview.measureUseSciNotationHint: Use scientific notation for measurement results.
webview.measureLabelSizeHint: Set the size of labels of measurement results.
webview.measureLineColorHint: Set the color of lines in measurement tool.
webview.measureLineThicknessHint: Set the thickness of lines in measurement tool.
webview.measurePointColorHint: Set the color of points in measurement tool.
webview.measurePointSizeHint: Set the size of points in measurement tool.
webview.measureMeshColorHint: Set the color of indicator surface in when measuring area.
